name: Agency Templates
description: Document templates for South African agencies and consultancies: creative briefs, statements of work, engagement letters, and monthly retainer reports.

templates.name: Creative Brief
templates.description: Creative brief capturing campaign type, target audience, deliverables, and timeline for a new agency project.

templates.name: Statement of Work
templates.description: Statement of work covering scope, deliverables, fee basis, and signature blocks for an agency engagement.

templates.name: Engagement Letter
templates.description: Engagement letter setting out the relationship, terms, and acceptance for an agency engagement.

templates.name: Monthly Retainer Report
templates.description: Monthly retainer activity report showing hours used against the hour bank for a retainer engagement.
